518 PAIN_THRPY_ADMSN_CD PAIN_THRPY_ADMSN_CD Pain interference with therapy activities (Adm) CHAR 1 This column document, at the time of admission, how often, in the past five days, pain has interfered with therapy. 0 = Does not apply - I have not received rehabilitation therapy in the past 5 days
